privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At SZ Oficial, we value your trust. This policy details how we handle the technical information necessary to provide the Terminal service.
privacy.sec1_text: Currently, SZ Oficial operates under a simplified access model. We do not manage user accounts or databases containing sensitive personal information.
privacy.sec1_li1: Session cookies and local preferences (language, theme).
privacy.sec1_li2: IP addresses and browser data for security and DDoS protection.
privacy.sec2_intro: Technical information is used exclusively to:
privacy.sec2_li2: Remember your visual preferences between visits.
privacy.sec3_text: You may restrict, block, or delete cookies from the Services at any time by modifying your browser configuration.
privacy.sec3_sub1_text: Most browsers allow you to refuse to accept cookies and to delete them. Methods vary by version.
privacy.sec3_sub2_text: Our Terminal uses Local Storage to save your drawings and chart configurations without needing a server. Most browsers allow blocking and deleting local storage via privacy settings.
privacy.sec4_text: Although we do not store credentials, we implement SSL/TLS (https) encryption on all communications to protect your browsing.
privacy.sec5_text1: Since we do not currently store user registries (accounts, passwords, or names) on our servers, we do not possess personal data that can be deleted upon request. Full control of your browsing data resides on your own device.
privacy.sec5_text2: If a registration system is implemented in the future, this policy will be updated to reflect your rights (GDPR/CCPA).
